conversations.say: Inez, management just flagged the unpreserved camera interval. We need to talk before anyone starts spinning stories about the service exit.
conversations.offer: Explain the exact reason why the camera record was allowed to lapse, protecting our tenant.
conversations.request: Agree on a common disclosure boundary before speaking publicly.

conversations.say: Rafi, let's look at the shift change records. The building's access logs don't match the polished version going around.
conversations.offer: Compare exact shift-change details without inventing customers or identities.
conversations.request: Verify our timeline of who was actually on duty.

conversations.say: Morgan, before I give any statement on the camera gap or access records, I need to know what fair treatment and a bounded account mean for my pension and the building.
conversations.offer: Provide a bounded operational account of the access gap.
conversations.request: Guarantee precise attribution and resident anonymity.

public_statement: The camera gap and the later automated access change are separate events. Don't let anyone collapse them into a convenient murder story without evidence.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundary regarding the camera gap and protect the tenant.

goal_progress: Approached Inez to discuss the camera interval audit notice.
Initiated shift and access comparison with Rafi.
Asked Morgan for terms of fair treatment before releasing full records.
reasoning_summary: Initiated conversations with Inez regarding the camera audit and tenant protection, Rafi regarding shift records, and Morgan regarding terms for a bounded account. Initialized beliefs neutrally at 25% across categories in Section 1.
